---
name: visual-rhythm-analyzer
description: Analyzes spacing, alignment, density, and visual rhythm. Use to identify layout drift and balance issues. Keywords: spacing, alignment, rhythm, density, balance, layout.
---

# Functionality
Evaluates visual rhythm and layout balance. Identifies spacing inconsistencies, alignment drift, density issues, and visual imbalance across screens or components.

# When to Use
Use when reviewing layout, spacing, alignment, vertical rhythm, or density.

# Instructions
Scan layout → check spacing scale → evaluate alignment → assess density → identify imbalance → no layout proposals.

# Output Format
- Spacing Inconsistencies  
- Alignment Drift  
- Density/Compression Issues  
- Visual Balance Problems  
- Rhythm/Flow Interruptions  

# Example
“Analyze the visual rhythm of this layout.”
